title: Ram® 6 x Giant Bubble Wand Sword Kids Childrens Bubble Maker Sticks Garden Party Toy 700ML
features: The Ram Pack of 6 assorted giant bubble swords
Each of the 6 bubble sword contains 118ml of bubble solution totalling in over 700ml of bubble mixture in the whole pack - perfect for weekends full of bubble fun
Bubble swords are complete with a screw-top lid with a giant bubble wand attached so you're able to get bubbling straight away and keep remaining solution in the bottle securely until the next time
The pack contains 6 bubble swords in assorted colours: green x 2, red x 2 and blue x 2

Each wand measures 37cm tall filled with 118ml of bubble solution - perfect size to create giant bubbles or use solution inside for bubble accessories such as bubble machines, bubble guns or bubble mowers
description: Product Description Ram® 6 x Giant Bubble Wand Sword Kids Childrens Bubble Maker Sticks Garden Party Toy 700ML Indications Children's Entertainment, Party Decoration, Creative Play Safety Warning For external use only.
